title: greenishlemon's XP Hearts
description: Gives you 1 extra heart for every 5 XP levels.
body:
## greenishlemon's XP Hearts
Hey!  This simple datapack gives you more hearts based on the amount of levels you have!
It is made so that for every 5 levels, you get an extra heart, maxing out at 20 hearts.

### Chart:
| Level | Hearts |
|--|--|
| 0 to 4 (what you start with) | 10 (base) |
| 5 to 9 | 11 |
| 10 to 14 | 12 |
| 15 to 19 | 13 |
| 20 to 24 | 14 |
| 25 to 29 | 15 |
| 30 to 34 | 16 |
| 35 to 39 | 17 |
| 40 to 44 | 18 |
| 45 to 49 | 19 |
| 50 and beyond | 20 (max) |
---
<details>
<summary>⚠️ Quick Warning</summary>
When you enchant, you lose levels.  This can make you lose hearts, triggering the hurt sound and effect.  I am just warning everyone, because this damage scared me when I used this pack on my server.
</details>

### Have fun! :)
